mechanism_narrative: A positive 3-month trend in retail sales indicates resilient household demand and near-term revenue growth for listed firms, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value is 357841.0 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 3-month RSAFS trends are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in no more than 50% of walk-forward observations or if the 3-year rolling Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate crosses above 4.0%, the higher discount rate reduces equity duration value and tightens financial conditions, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value is 4.16 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if triggered FEDFUNDS-above-4.0% episodes have average 20-day S&P 500 returns greater than the unconditional average in walk-forward testing or if downside hit rate is below 50%.

mechanism_narrative: Payroll expansion supports equity earnings only when unemployment is stable; positive PAYEMS growth with no material rise in UNRATE signals a non-recessionary labor market and positive S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:PAYEMS latest snapshot value is 134468.0 as of t-1mo
fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value is 4.9 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint PAYEMS-positive and UNRATE-stable condition does not produce higher 60-day S&P 500 returns than PAYEMS growth alone, or if the interaction coefficient is not positive in walk-forward regressions.

mechanism_narrative: A negative 3-month change in industrial production signals weakening real activity and pressure on cyclical earnings, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value is 108.96 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if INDPRO 3-month declines are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered walk-forward instances or if the mean triggered return is not below baseline.

mechanism_narrative: A rising trend in housing starts leads construction activity, durable goods demand, and credit creation, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:HOUST latest snapshot value is 2123.0 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if positive 6-month HOUST trends fail to predict positive 60-day S&P 500 returns with a hit rate above 55% or if rolling 3-year Rank IC is below 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer prices combined with rising policy rates signals an inflation-fighting tightening regime that compresses valuation multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: CPIAUCSL 6-month annualized change > 3% and FEDFUNDS 3-month change > 0
evidence_refs: fact:CPIAUCSL latest snapshot value is 197.8 as of t-2mo
fact:FEDFUNDS latest snapshot value is 4.16 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if the joint high-CPI and rising-FEDFUNDS trigger is not associated with lower 60-day S&P 500 returns than either condition alone, or if triggered returns are positive in more than 55% of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A rise in the unemployment rate through a high threshold signals deterioration in labor income and recession risk, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:UNRATE latest snapshot value is 4.9 as of t-1mo
failure_condition: Reject if UNRATE crossings above 4.8% are followed by positive 20-day S&P 500 returns in more than 60% of triggered cases or if the average triggered return is not below zero.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales growth without matching industrial production growth indicates demand running ahead of supply, raising inflation and margin risk, which produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
evidence_refs: fact:RSAFS latest snapshot value is 357841.0 as of t-1mo
fact:INDPRO latest snapshot value is 108.96 as of t-2mo
failure_condition: Reject if the RSAFS-up and INDPRO-flat-or-down interaction has nonnegative average 5-day S&P 500 returns in walk-forward tests or if adding CPIAUCSL does not strengthen the negative signal.
